basic_details.short_information: Central University of Odisha (CUO) Guest Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 10 July 2026 on the official website https://cuo.ac.in/. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the CUO Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following qualifications as per UGC Regulations 2018: | Essential Qualifications for Guest Faculty (Odia): | Master’s degree with minimum 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Odia or concerned/relevant/allied subject from a recognized Indian University or equivalent foreign degree. Must have cleared UGC NET / CSIR NET / SLET / SET or hold a Ph.D. degree. | Note: Selection will be based only on performance in the interview.

how_to_apply: Download the Application Form from the official university website.
Appear for Walk-in-Interview on 16.07.2026 at 03:00 PM at the specified venue.
Bring: Filled Application Form Original certificates, mark sheets & testimonials One set of self-attested photocopies Recent passport-size photograph
Venue: Guest House, CUO Main Campus, NAD-Sunabeda, Koraput, Odisha
important_instructions: This is a purely temporary guest faculty position. No regular appointment or benefits (pension, gratuity, leave, etc.) are admissible. Candidates must visit the university website regularly for any updates. The University reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process without assigning any reason. No correspondence will be entertained.

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Central University of Odisha, Sunabeda, Koraput has issued notification No. CUO/Admin/EGF/116 dated 10.07.2026 for engagement of 01 Guest Faculty in the Department of Odia. The engagement is purely temporary for one semester (likely extendable). Candidates are advised to read the official notification carefully before appearing for the walk-in-interview. Download Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Overview 2026

rows.central_university_of_odisha_koraput: Guest House, CUO Main Campus, NAD-Sunabeda, Koraput, Odisha

content_sections.heading: Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Important Dates 2026
CUO Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
CUO Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the following qualifications as per UGC Regulations 2018: Essential Qualifications for Guest Faculty (Odia): Master’s degree with minimum 55% marks (or equivalent grade) in Odia or concerned/relevant/allied subject from a recognized Indian University or equivalent foreign degree. Must have cleared UGC NET / CSIR NET / SLET / SET or hold a Ph.D. degree. Note: Selection will be based only on performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: CUO Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Other Terms & Conditions
content_sections.text: Purely temporary engagement for one semester. No claim for regular/permanent position. No TA/DA for attending interview. Maximum honorarium ₹50,000/- per month. Services can be terminated without notice if performance is unsatisfactory. Incomplete applications will be rejected. Candidates must bring filled application form + original documents + one set of photocopies.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CUO Guest Faculty 2026
content_sections.text: Download the Application Form from the official university website. Fill the form carefully. Appear for Walk-in-Interview on 16.07.2026 at 03:00 PM at the specified venue. Bring: Filled Application Form Original certificates, mark sheets & testimonials One set of self-attested photocopies Recent passport-size photograph Venue: Guest House, CUO Main Campus, NAD-Sunabeda, Koraput, Odisha

content_sections.heading: CUO Guest Faculty Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: This is a purely temporary guest faculty position. No regular appointment or benefits (pension, gratuity, leave, etc.) are admissible. Candidates must visit the university website regularly for any updates. The University reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process without assigning any reason. No correspondence will be entertained.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Central University of Odisha Guest Faculty Odia 2026?
faq.answer: There is no online application last date. Candidates must appear for the Walk-in-Interview on 16 July 2026 (03:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Guest Faculty in Odia at CUO Koraput?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Guest Faculty in the Department of Odia.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for CUO Guest Faculty Odia?
faq.answer: Master’s degree with 55% marks + UGC NET / CSIR NET / Ph.D. as per UGC 2018 regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary / honorarium for Guest Faculty at Central University of Odisha?
faq.answer: ₹1500 per lecture, subject to a maximum of ₹50,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. Is PhD mandatory for CUO Guest Faculty recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates with UGC NET / SLET / SET are also eligible along with Master’s degree.

faq.question: Q6. When and where is the walk-in-interview for CUO Koraput Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: 16.07.2026 at 03:00 PM at Guest House, CUO Main Campus, NAD-Sunabeda, Koraput, Odisha.

faq.question: Q7. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No. The engagement is purely temporary for one semester and can be terminated at any time.

faq.question: Q8. Do I need to send application by post for CUO Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: No. Candidates have to appear directly for the walk-in-interview with filled form and documents.

faq.question: Q9. Will TA/DA be provided for the interview?
faq.answer: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the walk-in-interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form and official notification for CUO Guest Faculty 2026?
faq.answer: Visit the official website https://cuo.ac.in/ for the latest notification and application form.
